summary: Defines JSON Web Signature: digitally signed or MACed content represented with base64url-encoded header, payload and signature segments, including the compact serialization 'header.payload.signature' used by JWTs. Appendix A.1 gives the complete worked HS256 example -- exact octets of the protected header and payload and the resulting signature -- used as a conformance vector.
title: JSON Web Signature (JWS)
